parameters.query: UPDATE architect_status SET is_online = $1::boolean, last_seen_at = now(), went_offline_at = CASE WHEN $1::boolean = false THEN now() ELSE went_offline_at END WHERE id = 1 RETURNING is_online, went_offline_at
SELECT cq.*, p.name as project_name FROM consultation_queue cq LEFT JOIN projects p ON cq.project_id = p.id WHERE cq.status = 'pending' ORDER BY cq.created_at ASC

parameters.subject: =[Studio AI] {{ $json.count }} consulta{{ $json.count !== 1 ? 's' : '' }} pendiente{{ $json.count !== 1 ? 's' : '' }} de los agentes

parameters.query: UPDATE consultation_queue SET status = 'sent', sent_at = now() WHERE status = 'pending'
